subcodes.first_line: O merciful friends! His Holiness 'Ali-Qabl-i-Akbar rendered praiseworthy services at the threshold of the One True God during his lifetime [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران رحمانی حضرت علی قبل اکبر خدمات مشکوره بدرگاه احدیت نمود در مدت حیات
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @law of burial and cremation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters
